h05b0ee13g7017g4fc8gb657gef20b78b84c4: Staying in this camp is making me... restless.
ha70dd9c7g4f0ag4299g8295gd7da07283a62: But I don't want to stray far. I've already learned the consequences the hard way.
h9332623agbd1ag498fg8a72g9efe31ff0a8b: Travel with me. I think we can both be of use to each other.
h174c6b51gad38g4be8gad16gf4f07fa19b5e: You I don't mind, but your... kin is another story.
h284fb3abg97f2g43e1g8ccagcb9ceae66d22: I'm sure things will sort themselves out on the road.
h7496f9f8g13f2g46cagabf2g5363be733a8e: Don't worry about her. I'm the one in charge.
hf4d15e5fg85a8g401bg8f22gd98425848b39: Fair enough. But a leader should always keep potential conflicts in mind, yes?
h6537ffacg4070g4a3bg837age217877d5750: We're all in this together. Whatever the issue with her is... best if you forget it.
h12aba278g8849g4525gb694g3651609f5866: Strange bedfellows and such. All right.
h8470f566g2652g47b0g992bg8b85f80fc278: And what does your gith companion have to say about that?
h2190336dg9d79g4313g94b0g800c7dc74b76: My head's been in a fog for days. This morning, it cleared away.
hf4b47c35g4972g4344g9ae6g18e57e075c7f: I'm not much for bowing and scraping, but... thank you.
he23433d1g45b8g4481gba6ag059266335692: Indeed, our last talk was abrupt, let's say. Tell me about yourself.
hc1765378g3ab5g474dgaacbgd3348f5191b3: Beyond 'Shadowheart'? There's not much to say.
h7b3bfdc3g4423g4502gb13eg40ee0c5f04ea: I was on my way to Baldur's Gate when that ship appeared. Considering our... shared affliction, I think you know the rest.
h31a929b9g62cfg4211gb0feg6f4989f219fa: There's more to a person than a name. Surely there's more you can tell me.
hc741b78agbc8bg41cfg9548g01066eab5fc5: Perhaps you'll learn more in time then. If we have time, that is.
h2075614ag2ec7g4ec8g9c5cg89078a66bea2: We find a healer - fast. We can't have much time left before ceremorphosis takes hold.
h808c2c6eg3d8fg412agaa0fgdced076f1b10: Agreed. Do you have any ideas?
hbd7289d0g9291g4dd4gb205g488fd14a4173: Baldur's Gate is an obvious answer, but we landed too damn far away.
h23f16bffga4a3g47d1gbbf2g2f32c11c016c: I doubt we'd make it in time. There has to be someone else nearby.
hc5e144d9ge482g4431g9166ga6029182cc7d: Come with me. Might as well carry out this hunt together.
h1d928ccdg2321g4bb1g98eeg92b0e57c5f16: I would, but you have a lot of hangers-on already. Thin your numbers, then we can talk.
h6c7cebe0gfce0g4d7ega11ag237d6d0ae0ee: I won't refuse some company. So long as it's outside my head.
hdc87e4a2g3f88g41e6g9119g252794c6a89c: Even if that gith over there doesn't seem to like me.
hdcdc53bbg7b39g44f9ga085g5889ffc75c18: Let's set off. Time is against us.
h0ac549e5gd342g40a0gb5c8gbbdd513cd7ea: 'We'? You tried to kill me, remember? I didn't agree to a partnership.
ha092efb0g9640g4af4g9c61g20e211f3769c: Neither of us agreed to a lot of what's happened lately. Perhaps together, we can change that.
ha839244fgc3c3g408aga5beg579bb7991508: Or perhaps I was mistaken, keeping your around.
he5368b76g1e02g4261gb6c0ga5bedca2ce90: I'll extend the grace you gave me and pretend that's not a threat.
ha0c24a0dg2fdfg4776g8a36g346f03b70980: I can be valuable in more ways than you might expect. When you figure out you need me, just say the word.
h3711e94fg11deg4672gace3g6146627f5b49: You can stay here, in camp.
hc61f4f93g388fg471dg892ega8ab9300ccd6: A relative safe haven, I suppose. I'll be here if you need me.
hac59c084gea4cg4b93gb95fg1dacd1ecd240: If you say so. Honestly, I feel fine. Better than ever, in ways.
h717caa50g880cg44c9g8e5fg7f9f1988c9f9: I... feel better too. Now that the voices are gone.
h453a553dgae83g4876g9133gdb97addb8011: But no doubt there's a tadpole squirming in our heads. We have to act.
h938bfe6aga1d9g4de5gbcf5g70939ff5e5d5: We need only find my kin. They will have a cure.
h18a8ed7fgb562g4a9cg9d8cgb04bb2253836: They do? I... well. That's curious.
h3b46288ag0c04g4dc2g94a1g1aff2588e4bf: My kin fought the ghaik menace for generations. We know their ways.
hd07c9f56g8793g4477ga2c1g3c6869463232: I didn't mean... fine. Yes. If you have a cure, then I need it as much as you do.
h3df0b5afgb1b3g4da7g81bbg23b8dfcc2f08: You seem uncomfortable around my kind - why?
ha8186463gd829g49d8gbe6dg99782263759a: No offense, but my first experience with your kind was one of your dragons nearly roasting me alive.
h9819d782g90f6g45d1ga498g46f5fb647f9c: And your fellow gith stares at me like she's contemplating how my heart tastes.
h0e7160c8g994ag4a45g9abfgdf8ab858e4f2: You should be grateful. Not many outsiders ever benefit from githyanki knowledge.
h3d929e10geed6g4014g89e0g0bc344d4bfec: I'll save my gratitude for when I'm cured.
h35028832g3337g4af4gb0aegf34a2156b40b: Shadowheart? Interesting. Would've pegged you for a 'Molly', myself.
h6d4c727bgf041g4be2gaa3cgfcfcc0f77de5: A haunting pack of voices almost drove me to murder you, and my name is strange?
h6009c02agef8ag4fb1gadbfgc759f502f56a: I'm glad to run into a fellow half-elf.
ha35221bcg687bg4fb2gb1dbg4ae66b93d57d: We're not exactly special. There's a lot of bored elves and curious humans out there.
hde385262g1fbfg4e7cgbf40gf1466e352506: I'm just glad to see you're feeling better.
ha2bb0e47g8a10g420agb03fg22616b125e6a: You should be careful. Plenty would take advantage of that.
h1d0dd6adg3080g4c37gb964gb0791b7a7065: Tell me about these voices again. There must be more to them.
h82c1cccdg6004g47fcgaf42g2a2c11f2c4a3: They weren't distinct. Just... this constant onslaught.
h1d2e8e94gcb31g45beg9925gfaf7d2dec03e: Run. Run. Find her. It only ever stopped when I went the right direction.
hd164ce4bg1fcdg4ce9gb20agf27262a515e3: Run. Run. Find him. It only ever stopped when I went the right direction.
h25cf742fg5184g4ae5g8c0bgaee592aa0162: And even then, only for a moment. Until I got here.
heb367d6bgc9adg4fe0gb388gbbfe3a4f66bf: The voices wanted you to find me? Personally?
h87022fd5g89bcg4b1bgb8ecg05c72920dd70: Apparently so. They weren't inclined to explain why, just to drive half-berserk.
h57ddfe5bg43c6g48fdgbf51gb647246e8df8: And trust me, I'd love an explanation.
h44f8946eg84d1g4780gb760g1b6f8e2207ef: Not still harbouring urges to kill me, are you?
h1ddd0719g879fg45f0gb405g61f95b15e0cc: No. As long as the voices stay away, I think you're safe.
hd23f149cgfc5eg46e7g9763g3d78da9a4c4b: But I promise any future murderous intentions will be thoroughly justified.
hc7f8a720g553eg4652g8fefga34c897f5029: This is no laughing matter. I mightn't be so understanding in future.
h65bfc3efga528g4776g9576g6d92ed8baae6: You have nothing to fear from me, so long as the feeling's mutual.
h9af99d82g0d14g4c58ga77ag54c53ba9559a: Sounds like you'll keep things interesting, at least.
hbe5d7a00gb883g4d8ag80e7g4d9a85747ccd: Remarkably calm for a woman I planned to run through. I can appreciate that.
h13163f12ge412g439fg94d8g7ef05790b6c7: Remarkably calm for a man I planned to run through.  I can appreciate that.
hac166a71g0087g4de7gbeb3g7d2fa702c0f8: If the voices return, tell me at once.
hf1779fb2gda07g4c9dgb411g189fa90139fd: I'll do what I can. It was difficult to do... anything in that haze.
hb901d661gc676g41bcg8ec9g3e7766a0f378: These voices could be to do with our infection.
h1a3bcb30ge033g439bgb486g29c6a6962c8f: You have a tadpole too. I'm the only one who lost her bloody mind.
he0a9f48ag575ag4e1ag9c38g249d043d903a: I'm not ruling anything out. Unfortunately that doesn't leave me with a lot of firm answers.
hf9b5352bgf4aag4fe6g9494g53104bf64678: You spoke about voices in your head last night. Tell me more.
